reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content: 강아지랑 외출 할 때 가볍게 사용하기 딱 좋아요 바리바리 바리스타라 한번 외출에도 짐이 많은데 작지만 은근 많이 들어가요 색도 귀엽고 간편해요!
reviews.content_en: Perfect for taking my pup out on the go! Barista always has so much stuff for even a quick outing, but this bag is compact yet surprisingly spacious. The color is cute and it's so convenient!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 가방에 자석으로 똑딱이 있어서 좋은것 같아요! 귀욤귀욤합니다
reviews.content_en: I love that the bag has a magnetic snap closure! It's absolutely adorable 🥰

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
전에 쓰건 초록색 애코백이 흐물흐물해져서 신상 나온김에 핑계삼아 구매했어요!! 
전 모델도 3년차 사용중인데 터짐없이 아직도 들고 다녀요~. 
이번 모델은 가운데 클로징 자석도 있고 너비도 넓어지고 사다리꼴모양이라 더 마음에 들어요. 색상도 너무 이뻐서 다 갖고 싶지만, 민트로 샀어요. 
역시 이뻐요~. 전 모델보다 수납이 잘 되서 여름에 가볍게 들고 다닐 수 있어서 좋네요. 
추천해요~.
reviews.content_en: My old green eco bag got all saggy, so I used the new model as an excuse to buy one! 😄 I've been using the previous model for 3 years and it still holds up without any tears. This new one has a magnetic closure in the middle, wider width, and a trapezoid shape that I love even more. The color is so pretty I want them all, but I went with mint. It's beautiful~ Storage works better than the previous model, so it's perfect for carrying light in the summer. Highly recommend~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 미니 에코백이랑은 또 다른 느낌의 색감들이에요! 기존에 없던 색들이 눈에 띄어서 파스텔톤 쪽으로 선택했는데 맘에 들어요ㅎㅎ 작아도 알차게 들어갈 건 다 들어가고 자석이 있어서 너무 좋아요!! 아 개인적으로 미니 에코백이랑 컴피백이 미니 크로스백 버전으로도 나오면 좋겠어요,,♡ 다견 가정이라서 산책하다가 이게 크로스백이면 얼마나 더 편할까..?라는 생각이 문득 들었네요,,😉
reviews.content_en: The colors are completely different from the mini eco bag! The new shades really caught my eye, so I went with the pastel tones and I'm loving it ㅎㅎ Even though it's small, everything I need fits in perfectly and the magnetic closure is amazing!! Personally, I wish the mini eco bag and comfy bag would come out as mini crossbody versions too♡ Since we have multiple dogs, I was thinking how much more convenient it would be if this were a crossbody bag while we're out walking 😉

reviews.name: Z****
reviews.content:
배송 정말 너무너무 빠르고 예쁜 파란색 에코백입니다.
이번 선택에 매우 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: Shipping was incredibly fast and it's such a pretty blue eco bag. I'm very satisfied with this purchase.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
택배 열어보고 생각보다 작아서 조금 놀랐어요 ㅋㅋ
그래도 가격이 엄청 저렴하고 디자인이 귀여워서 만족합니다
조금 큰 사이즈도 나오면 좋겠어요 내부 주머니도 있음 좋겠구요 ㅎㅎ
색이 너무 이쁘고 탄탄한 소재라 휘뚤마뚤 가능할것같아요
만족합니당 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: When I opened the package I was a bit surprised at how small it was lol but the price is super affordable and the design is so cute that I'm satisfied anyway. I'd love it if they made a bigger size too, and it would be nice if there were interior pockets ㅎㅎ The color is so pretty and the material is sturdy so it should fold up compactly. I'm happy with it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
너무 마음에 들어요. 오렌지컬러 구매하면서 핑크도 함께 구해할걸 후회했어요. ㅠㅠ
왕자 산색시 실용도 더하기  패션아이템이 입니다.^^♡♡
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it. I regret not getting the pink when I bought the orange 😭 It's both practical and a fashion statement at the same time 😊♡♡

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
색감 쨍하고 귀여워여

산책갈때 물병이랑 간식 물티슈 하네스 정도 가지고 나가기 딱 좋아요

똑딱이 있는것도 은근히 유용하네요!
reviews.content_en:
The colors are so vibrant and cute!

It's perfect for walks when I need to bring a water bottle, some treats, wet wipes, and a harness.

The magnetic snap is surprisingly useful too!

reviews.name: C****
reviews.content:
이미 기존에 사용하고 있어서 컬러별로 더 구매했네요. 
가쥐와의 산책. 가까운곳 외출시 안성맞춤!!

컬러별로 구매 추천합니다.  뚝딱 단추도 있어서 안에 내용물이 빠지지않아요!!
reviews.content_en:
I was already using it so I ended up buying more in different colors. Perfect for walks with my furry friend and short outings nearby!!

I recommend buying different colors. The magnetic snap keeps everything inside from falling out!!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
귀여워요 ㅋㅋ 휠뚤마뚤 들고다니기 딱 좋은 사이즈에요
안에 단추가 자석이라 생각보다 퀄리티있어요
긴가민가하면서 샀는데 진짜 맘에들어요
아쉬운건 색..? 색이 파스텔 계열도 있엇으면 좋겟어요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: So cute lol It's the perfect size to carry around folded up. The snap inside is magnetic so it has better quality than expected. I was hesitant about buying it but I really love it. My only wish is that there were pastel color options too lol

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 작년에 산책가방 산거 잘 들고다녀서 다른 색으로 주문했어요! 사이즈가 더 커지고 자석도 달려있네요 작은사이즈랑 두가지 모두 다 판매했으면 좋겠어요!
reviews.content_en: I've been using the walk bag I bought last year and it's held up great, so I ordered it in a different color! This one is bigger and has a magnet too. I wish they sold both the small and larger sizes!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 와~진짜 컴팩트하고 싸이즈 좋고, 무엇보다 가운데 똑딱이 있어 넘 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: Wow, it's really compact and a great size, and best of all it has a snap closure in the middle—love it!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 여름이라 블루 아주 예뻐요! 노랑으로도 하나 주문할까 싶어요ㅎㅎ 간단하게 이것저것 넣고 휘뚜루 마뚜루 산책가기 좋구요! 이거 들구 간단하게 뭐 사도 쏙 들가구 좋네여🫶
reviews.content_en: The blue looks so pretty for summer! I'm thinking about ordering one in yellow too hehe 😊 It's perfect for just tossing in whatever and going for a walk! With this bag, everything fits in so nicely and conveniently 🫶

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 크지않은 산책가방 넘 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 조금 작은것 같아도 들어갈거 알차게 싹 다 들어가는 꿀템 ㅎㅎ 컬러도 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I really love this not-too-big walk bag hehe It looks a little small but everything you need fits in so perfectly—total gem hehe The color is pretty too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 가방 가볍고 생각보다 많이 들어가고 예뻐요 다만 작은 물건들 수납할 수 있는 속주머니가 하나 있으면 더 좋을 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: The bag is lightweight and holds more than I expected, plus it looks great! Though I think it would be even better if it had one interior pocket for storing smaller items.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
6가지 색상 모두 예뻐서 고민 끝에 고른 민트 색상, 마음에 들고 가방 크기도 좋아요
다만, 중간 어디쯤 칸막이 하나 있으면 더 실용적이겠어요
reviews.content_en: All 6 colors are so pretty that after much deliberation I chose mint, and I'm really happy with it. The bag size is great too. That said, I think it would be more practical if there was a divider somewhere in the middle.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 짱짱하고 산책하고 가지고다니기편하고이뻐요
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy, convenient to carry on walks, and so cute!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content:
생각보다 미니사이즈라 놀랐는데 은근히 많이 들어가네요
똑딱 자석 단추가 있어서 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en: I was surprised it's actually a mini size, but it surprisingly holds quite a lot! The snap magnetic closure is really nice.

reviews.name: W****
reviews.content: 이번에 재구매입니다! 전에 산 노란색이 너무 예쁘고 가방은 작고 귀엽고 많은 물건을 넣을 수 있습니다!
reviews.content_en: This is a repurchase for me! The yellow one I got before is so pretty, and the bag is small, adorable, and can hold lots of items!

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
색감이 너무 예뻐요
필요한 산책 용품만 따악 넣기에 크기도 적당하구요
너무 맘에 들어욜
reviews.content_en: The color is so pretty. The size is just right for throwing in only the essentials you need for a walk. I'm really loving it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색이 예쁘고 원단도 좋아요. 은근 많이 들어가고요. 배송비 절약하려고… 필요에 산 건 아니지만 잘 써볼게요
reviews.content_en: The color is pretty and the fabric quality is great. It holds quite a lot too. I bought it to save on shipping, wasn't really necessary but I'll definitely use it well.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 핑크귀여워서 민트도샀어요 안주머니도 잇음 더 조앗을것같아요. 그리고 살짝 빵꾸잇어요 ㅜ
reviews.content_en: The pink is so cute that I bought the mint one too. I wish it had an inner pocket. And there's a small tear 😢

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
노란색사고 싶었는데 없어서 색상 고민하다 핑크샀어요
자석잠금도 있고 작고 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: I wanted the yellow but it was out of stock, so I debated the colors and went with pink. It has a magnetic closure and it's small and adorable.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
넘귀여운 미니 백이에요 전에 민트색 사고 2번째는 파랑
때 탈까봐 그나마 티안나는 색으루 ^^
reviews.content_en: Such a cute mini bag! I got the mint one before, and this is my second purchase in blue. I went with a color that doesn't show dirt as easily ^^

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 계속고민만하다가이번에시켰는데시키길잘했어요색상도이쁘고넉넉하게들어가네요잘쓸게요
reviews.content_en: I kept going back and forth, but I finally ordered it this time and I'm so glad I did! The color is pretty and it holds plenty of stuff. Will use it well!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content: 너무 깜찍하고 귀여워요. 똑딱이가 있어서 쏟아짐 방지가 되어 더 잘 사용할 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and cute. It has a snap closure which prevents spilling, so I think I'll be able to use it even better.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 제품 사진 속 옐로우가 처음부터 눈에 딱 들어와 바로 겟 했어요!! 너무 예뻐용💛💛💛
reviews.content_en: The yellow in the product photos caught my eye right away so I got it immediately!! It's so pretty 💛💛💛

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 응산책 하러 다닐 때 지갑이랑 휴지, 폰 등등 넣어 다니기에 딱 좋은 사이즈네요^^
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for carrying around on walks with my pup - fits my wallet, tissues, phone, and all that stuff ^^

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 베이지 너무 이뻐요 민트색 가지고 있는데 지인분껀데 너므 이쁘네요 탐나는 색상
reviews.content_en: The beige is so pretty! I have the mint one and got one for a friend, and it's just so cute. Such a desirable color.

reviews.name: 화****
reviews.content:
8월 출첵 이벤트로 받은 가방 !! 너무 기여워용
산책할때 쓰면 완벽 😆
reviews.content_en: The bag I got from the August check-in event!! It's so adorable 😆 Perfect for using on walks!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 노린색 구매하고 귀여워서 이 색도 구매했는데 파란색도 갖고 싶네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I bought the beige one and loved it so much I got this color too, but now I want the blue one too haha 😄

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 색깔이 너무 마음에 들고 사이즈도 적당해요!!
reviews.content_en: I love the color so much and the size is just right!!

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content: 미니사이즈에 귀여워요 휘뚜루마뚜루로 딱이에요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute in the mini size - perfect for Hwiturumaturoo 💕

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 민트 색 완전 이뻐요 간편하게 넣기 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The mint color is absolutely gorgeous and it's so convenient to use!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요!! 추석때 물품 챙겨서 가려고요
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable!! I'm planning to take it with me for Chuseok to pack our things

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 쪼끄마하니 너무 귀여워요 쨍한파랑이에요
reviews.content_en: It's so tiny and so cute! The bright blue color is gorgeous 💙

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 블루 색상이 너무 예뻐요!
reviews.content_en: The blue color is so pretty!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지 유치원 갈 때 짐가방으로 사용하려
7월 출석이벤트간 받은 쿠폰으로 구매했어요!
쨍한 코발트 블루 색감이 너무 예뻐요💙
reviews.content_en: I'm planning to use it as a gym bag when my pup goes to puppy daycare. I bought it with a coupon I got from the July attendance event! The bright cobalt blue is so beautiful 💙

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 잘 쓰던 산책가방이 더러워져서 버린김에 새로 나온 미니로 사봤어요!! 큰 산책가방은 여러개인데 작은건 하나뿐이었는데 그거 마저 버리게 되서 산건데 만족해요! 오프라인에서 보니 핑크도 예뻐서 핑크도 곧 살까봐요~
reviews.content_en: My old walk bag got dirty so I decided to replace it and tried the new mini size! I had multiple large walk bags but only one small one, and that one wore out too, so I bought this and I'm really satisfied! I saw the pink one in-store and it's so pretty - I think I might buy that soon too~

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 작은줄은 알앗지만 생각보다 정말 작네요~ 근데 너무 귀엽고 딱 필요한거는 다 넣을 수 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I knew it was small but it's even tinier than I expected~ But it's so cute and I can fit everything I need in it so I'm really happy!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
생각보다 작은데 귀여워요
똑딱이 단추도 있어서 벌어지지 않겠어요
울애기 산책 가방으로 좋네요
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I thought, but it's so cute! 😊 It has a snap button so it won't come open. It's perfect as a walking bag for my little one!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
제 생각보다는 좀 작은 편이긴 했는데 사이즈에
비해 많이 들어가고 가벼워서 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: It's a bit smaller than I expected, but it holds a lot for its size and it's really lightweight! 👍

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 생각보다 작은데 색깔도 이쁘고 만족이에요!!
reviews.content_en: It's smaller than I thought, but the color is so pretty and I'm really happy with it!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 더 작았어요~ 그래도 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: It was even smaller than expected~ But it's still adorable 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미 제품 사랑하눈 사람이에요~봄이 되서 기분 전환할겸 노랑노랑한 산책 가방 하나 구매요~
reviews.content_en: I'm a BITE ME product lover~ Since spring is here, I decided to treat myself and got this bright yellow walking bag for a mood refresh! 🌼

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
산책가방으로 샀는데 생각보다 엄청 작았어요
보부상인 저에게는 … ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
그래도 기여워서 간단하게 사용하기 조아용
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a walking bag but wow, it was way smaller than I expected ㅋㅋㅋㅋ For someone like me who carries a lot... lol But it's so cute that I'm just using it for simple things!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 예전 버전 산책 할 때 아주 잘 쓰고 있는데 이번에 새롭게 나와서 주문해 보았어요~ 색도 화먄이랑 같고 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I've been using the previous version for walks and it's working great, so I ordered the new version when it came out~ The color is the same as my phone case and it looks really nice! 🐕

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 앞에 쓰던 초록가방이 낡아서 삿어요 모양은 전에가방이 이뿐대 똑딱이가 달려서 좋아요 옅은 민트색이에요
reviews.content_en: My old green bag got worn out so I got this one. The design is nice like my old bag, but this one has a snap button which is great! It's a soft mint color.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 오렌지 색상 쨍 하니 귀엽습니다. 저는  여기에 미용기구  담아서  들고 다니면서  미용해요
reviews.content_en: The bright orange color is so cute! I carry my grooming tools in it and do my beauty routine on the go 💅

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 안에 강아지꺼 물건들고 놓러갈때 너무좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's so convenient when I need to carry my dog's things around~! 🐶
